Nevederia's Horn  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 15
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 20
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10
SV FIRE: +10
Effect: Suffocate (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR RNG ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Nevederia's Horn
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 15
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 20
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10
SV FIRE: +10
Effect: Suffocate (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Parr
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2002 at 10:54 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769905227
9 posts
Parr used to wear full Cobalt, that is in fact a cobalt BP he is wearing in the picture.

He just liked the look, and there are very few warriors with full cobaly on CT, he just liked being unique.

He doesn't wear Cobalt anymore, however. :(

Xioxou Mao
57 Vah Rogue

# Jan 14 2002 at 10:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248535770
11 posts
delay is capped at 10..there is no delay lower
▲ Page top
RE: dealy
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 12:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570776553
40 posts
delay is not capped at 10
▲ Page top
RE: dealy
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2003 at 8:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256914767
30 posts
yes, it is.
▲ Page top
RE: dealy
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2004 at 3:37 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591754055236
Sage
140 posts
Delay is not, and never has been capped at 10. This was a rumor stemming from the fact that the server-side something-or-other (techy-stuff) couldn't register any damage faster than every 1 second in the early days of EQ. It wasn't officially capped, but until Kunark, I believe, this problem existed. There is no delay cap.
▲ Page top
RE: dealy
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2003 at 5:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
I believe it's a soft cap. It's possible to have weapons with a lower delay than 10 (look at bixie stinger pre nerf) but I believe they still acted as if they were 10 delay. So, no 10 isn't the minimum delay. But, yes it is at the same time.
▲ Page top
RE: dealy
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2005 at 2:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592271745725
4 posts
10 delay is the fastest Graphics can show, but not the cap. Lots of weapons fully hasted break the 10 cap
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 8:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773203912
32 posts
Actualy I didn't mean to say "Customized Kael Quest Armor".. I meant to say "Warrior Kael Quest Armor".

I have Troubador's... it looks like crap until you get a full set.
▲ Page top
RE: Helm
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 8:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773203912
32 posts
LOL I get a good laugh outta people sometimes.

He IS a human.
That IS a customized racial crown... I own one.

And that sure looks like customized Kael quest warrior armor to me... have you taken the time to PLAY a human? The armor looks dark because the dude is BLIND... and if you look at the background the sun is nearly done setting. If it were day-light, he was a different race, or someone cast Acumen on him it would look lighter and you would not be having this debate.

Sometimes I think more people should play the Human race so they can understand the pain we go through at night.
▲ Page top
RE: Helm
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2002 at 10:26 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247814425
View User Forum
32 posts
It is Cobalt armor. I looked at Parr's profile a while back and he did wear a full suit of Cobalt armor for the look.

I know this a little off topic but in that pic thats a pretty cool looking Helm that Half-Elf has on. I wonder what class that guy is to have a helm like that. Anyone know anything about that Helm? Those appear to be Dragon Wings. 2 THUMBS UP!!

▲ Page top
Nice Proc
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 2:55 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591757464810
156 posts
Suffocate:

Decrease Current Hitpoints from 34 (L29) to 65 (L60)
Decrease Strength from 15 (L29) to 20 (L38)
Decrease Agility from 15 (L29) to 20 (L38)
DoT for 198 Hit Points (HP) in 18 ticks
▲ Page top
RE: Nice Proc
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2001 at 7:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246197254
View User Forum
8 posts
Where do you get the information on Effects? Also, can you clarify a little for me? What does it mean in layman's terms when you say from 34 (L29) to 65 (L60) Does this mean for a Level 29 player it is 34 damage, at 30 would be 35 etc to 65 points at lvl 60?

Is there a website which lists all the spell effects in the game? If so, can you post it?

Thanks,
Looseleaf

▲ Page top
Keep in mind
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 12:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749811190
Sage
295 posts
It's offhand only, so the delay doesn't matter as much - no damage bonus when hitting with your offhand. It's still a great weapon now, though, and I regret that we had some of the pre-upgrade ones rot (6/15 if memory serves).

As the name implies, drops off Lady Nevedaria.

▲ Page top
A Good Reason
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 5:09 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591763261482
9 posts
It can not be stressed enough the importance of working up several different weapon skills. From level 1 onward I alternated 1H slash with piercing. When i got duel wield I used a 1H slash weapon with a piercing weapon. This weapon is the best reason I have seen yet to have worked so hard on multiple weapon skills. I only hope someday (sigh) to be able to get one of these.
▲ Page top
RE: A Good Reason
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
and you'll never get one, so it doesn't matter, what about 1hb, have you been using that?
▲ Page top
RE: A Good Reason
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 2:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761933927
26 posts
piercing is pretty easy for a warrior to raise at 30 my warrior decided he wanted a sheild of slain unicorn for the ac, however he couldn't use peircing to save his life. Grab to fs daggers zone into solb tell people that you are not trying to ks them but working on peircing and poke away with the 2 very fast weapons it was only a matter of a couple hours before he had maxed out peircing, and the enchanter buffs helped ;) 1hb was also easy grab 2 black jacks find some blues that people are pulling and go to town 2hb ... that was another story all together.
▲ Page top

Low Delays
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 7:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248143071
10 posts
Additional Low Delay Items:

Reluvant Whip (Plane of Hate)

Dmg: 5 Dly: 14 Ranger Only

Barbed Scale Whip (used to drop of Draketamer in Frontier Mtns):

Dmg: 4 Dly: 11

And the Pally blade from Plane of Air was a DROP (not a quest) from Bazzt Zzzt and it no longer drops, or it is so reported.
